contract.contract_footer_note: By registering on the platform, you confirm that you have read the terms of this Agreement and fully agree to them.
contract.section_1_1: This Public Offer Agreement (hereinafter - "Agreement") is an official proposal from the platform (hereinafter - "Company") to conclude an agreement for the provision of platform services (hereinafter - "Services") on the terms set forth below.
contract.section_1_2: According to Article 641 of the Civil Code of Ukraine, upon acceptance of the terms of this Agreement by registering on the platform, a natural or legal person who accepts this offer becomes the Customer.
contract.section_1_3: The Agreement comes into force from the moment of Customer registration on the platform and remains in effect until the parties fulfill their obligations.
contract.section_1_4: The Company reserves the right to make changes to the terms of this Agreement by notifying the Customer by posting a new edition on the platform.
contract.section_2_1: The Company undertakes to provide the Customer with access to the platform for organizing and participating in educational programming competitions.
contract.section_2_2: Services include: access to the tournament system, task checking, results statistics, educational materials.
contract.section_2_3: The Customer undertakes to pay for Services according to the selected tariff plan within the established timeframes.
contract.section_3_1: Payment for services is made in Ukrainian hryvnias in non-cash form using: Liqpay Online payment service (https://www.liqpay.ua) or payment to settlement account.
contract.section_3_2: In case of payment using Liqpay Online payment service, the Customer is redirected to the LiqPay payment service, where the Customer can pay using Visa and Mastercard payment systems. In this case, payment is additionally regulated by the rules of the payment service, bank (including the card issuing bank of the Customer) and other payment participants. The Executor does not process banking card operations. In case of errors or payment refusals, the Customer should contact the card issuing bank or the representative of the payment system through which the payment was made.
contract.section_3_2_1: The Company does not store the Customer's bank card data. All payments are processed through the secure LiqPay payment gateway, which complies with PCI DSS security standards. Card data is transmitted directly to the payment system via an encrypted connection.
contract.section_3_3: The Customer bears full responsibility for providing erroneous or false information that made it impossible for the Executor to properly fulfill their obligations to the Customer. Any payment made on behalf of the Customer using the Customer's personal data and payment methods is considered to be made by the Customer themselves.
contract.section_3_4: The price of services does not include commissions and additional fees of banks and payment systems. The Customer pays such fees independently and at their own expense. The amount of commission or additional fee is reported by the respective bank and payment system.
contract.section_4_title: Rights and Obligations of the Parties
contract.section_4_1: The Company has the right to: suspend the provision of Services in case of violation of the Agreement terms by the Customer; modify the platform functionality with prior notification to users.
contract.section_4_2: The Company undertakes to: ensure proper functioning of the platform; provide technical support; protect the Customer's personal data.
contract.section_4_3: The Customer has the right to: use all platform functions according to the selected tariff; receive technical support; demand quality of Services.
contract.section_4_4: The Customer undertakes to: not violate the platform rules; not use the platform for illegal purposes; pay for Services in a timely manner.
contract.section_5_title: Cost of Services and Payment Procedure
contract.section_5_1: The cost of Services is determined according to the tariff plans posted on the OlimpX platform.
contract.section_5_2: Payment for Services is made in non-cash form through payment systems integrated into the platform.
contract.section_5_3: Services are provided on a prepaid basis. The payment period is 1 month, 3 months, or 1 year depending on the selected tariff.
contract.section_5_4: In case of late payment, the Company has the right to suspend the provision of Services until full repayment of the debt.
contract.section_6_1: For non-performance or improper performance of the terms of this Agreement, the parties are liable in accordance with the current legislation of Ukraine.
contract.section_6_2: The Company is not liable for temporary failures in the platform operation related to technical work or force majeure circumstances.
contract.section_6_3: The Customer bears full responsibility for keeping their login and password for platform access.
contract.section_6_4: In case of violation of copyright or other intellectual property rights of third parties, the Customer bears full financial responsibility.
contract.section_7_1: The Company undertakes not to disclose the Customer's personal data received during the provision of Services.
contract.section_7_2: Personal data is processed in accordance with the Law of Ukraine "On Personal Data Protection".
contract.section_7_3: The Customer consents to the processing of their personal data for the purpose of providing Services by the platform.
contract.section_7_4: The Company has the right to use anonymized data for statistical analysis and to improve the quality of Services.
contract.section_8_title: Term of the Agreement and Procedure for its Amendment
contract.section_8_1: This Agreement is valid throughout the entire period of the Customer's use of the platform services.
contract.section_8_2: The Customer has the right to terminate the Agreement unilaterally by notifying the Company 7 days before termination.
contract.section_8_3: The Company has the right to terminate the Agreement in case of systematic violation of the Agreement terms by the Customer.
contract.section_8_4: Changes to the Agreement come into force from the moment they are posted on the platform.
contract.section_9_1: All disputes arising from this Agreement are resolved through negotiations.
contract.section_9_2: In case of failure to reach an agreement, disputes are referred to the court at the location of the Company.
contract.section_9_3: Current legislation regulates relations not regulated by this Agreement.
contract.section_9_4: All claims and complaints are considered by the Company within 10 working days from their receipt.
contract.section_10_1: This Agreement is the complete agreement between the parties regarding its subject and cancels all previous oral or written agreements.
contract.section_10_2: Neither party may transfer their rights and obligations under this Agreement to third parties without the written consent of the other party.
contract.section_10_3: All messages and notifications between the parties are sent by email or through the OlimpX platform.
contract.section_10_4: The Agreement is drawn up in Ukrainian in two copies having equal legal force.
contract.section_11_1: The Customer has the right to a refund in cases provided by this Agreement and the current legislation of Ukraine.
contract.section_11_2: Refunds are processed within 14 working days from receipt of a written request from the Customer.
contract.section_11_3: To request a refund, the Customer must send an email to the Company, indicating the reason for the refund and the details for the refund.
contract.section_11_4: Refunds are not provided in the following cases: if the Customer has used the Services in full; in case of violation of the Agreement terms due to the Customer's fault; if more than 30 days have passed since the payment.
contract.section_11_5: When refunding, the amount of payment system commissions (including LiqPay commission) is not compensated and is deducted from the refund amount.
contract.section_11_6: In case of payment through the LiqPay payment system, refunds are possible only through the same payment system according to its rules and timelines.
contract.section_11_7: The Company is not responsible for delays in refunds related to the operation of banking institutions or payment systems.
